text: 1331 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ رُكُوبِ اَلْبَحْرِ فِي هَيَجَانِهِ فَقَالَ «وَ لِمَ يُغَرِّرُ اَلرَّجُلُ بِدِينِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1331 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about traveling by sea when it is turbulent.
He (as) replied: "Why would a person endanger his life and his religion?".
